creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
I, too, can't replicate. My only thought is that this was a system install on a new system from a snapshot of main. I am unsure of the date of ports tree in the snapshot. After the initial build of system, I installed several "critical" ports including virtualbox-ose which pulled in kBuild. These were ports builds, not installing packages.

I then "rm -r /usr/ports" and used git to clone in a tree. Thereafter I updated source tree and rebuilt the system with PORTS_MODULES = emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod. That is where it failed. I have tried everything I can think of to replicate the failure, but have been unable to do so I am closing the ticket. Sory for wasting your time.
